# IndieTennis
> The Independent Tennis Network — independent tennis shows, commentary, and writing for people who love the game beyond the mainstream broadcast.

## Shows
- Inside Tennis with The Koz: https://www.indietennis.com/show/inside-tennis-with-the-koz
- The Resort Channel: https://www.indietennis.com/show/the-resort-channel
- Tennis Today with Dr. Jack Ditty: https://www.indietennis.com/show/tennis-today-with-dr-jack-ditty
- Kwik Tips: https://www.indietennis.com/show/kwik-tips

## Blog
- Best Independent Tennis Podcasts (2025): https://www.indietennis.com/blog/best-independent-tennis-shows-podcasts

## About
Independent tennis network founded 2008. Covers the game beyond official broadcast infrastructure.
